title: ozothamnus glomeratus
intro: Ozothamnus glomeratus, also known as the woolly everlasting, is a shrubby plant native to Australia and New Zealand, characterized by its grayish-green foliage and small, white flowers. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Ozothamnus glomeratus include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of respiratory conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea or infused oil, which can be used to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing.
